MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bryn Rohde-Davies for (trustee) Julie Grovhoug-Coyle.

The Court stated that it is looking for the 7th accounting. Ms. Rohde-Davies reported that she has received the accounting, that the petition is almost complete and requested a 2 week continuance. The status on filing an accounting was continued to November 30, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Yolanda Mazariegos. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
